title: BlossomEQ - Tack Library Resourcepack
description: A resourcepack needed for the BlossomEQ Tack Library mod
body:
This texturepack allows you to make better tack for SWEM, when paired with [BlossomEQ's Tack Library Mod](https://modrinth.com/project/blommsomeq-tack-library).
BlossomEQ mod can be used to show these spaces, as the transport boots, fly masks, neck breast collars and snaffle bridles need this texturepack to show up correctly.
   

## What does it add?
- higher leg wraps space, so they can go over the whole leg
- halters and bridles now render nose and ears, so your fly masks can now cover ears
- breast collars can now go over the neck
- saddlepads can now cover more space on the horse
